parsed_profile.pov_distance: Close third-person through protagonist with frequent internal monologue
parsed_profile.sentence_rhythm: Short punchy sentences in dialogue contrasting with longer explanatory passages for exposition
parsed_profile.paragraphing: Scene breaks marked with chapter heading markers, ellipsis used for pacing pauses
parsed_profile.dialogue_method: AI and protagonist engage in challenge-rebuttal pattern for exposition delivery
parsed_profile.description_method: Minimal sensory description, focus on action consequences and character reactions
parsed_profile.exposition_method: AI provides theoretical frameworks to explain supernatural elements
parsed_profile.hook_delivery: Chapter concludes mid-action with threat approach as cliffhanger
parsed_profile.transition_method: Narrative interweaves multiple plot threads without clear scene breaks

reader_promise.primary_thrill: Intense supernatural creature pursuit combined with lore revelation
reader_promise.emotional_arc: Wounded pride transformed into redemption-seeking through dangerous mission
reader_promise.knowledge_gradient: Mythological legends revealed as literal historical events with modern implications

core_engine.dominant_mechanism: Supernatural creature pursuit synchronized with AI-exposition delivery system
supporting_mechanisms: AI delivers exposition through challenge-rebuttal debate with protagonist
Humiliated character arc initiates through pride injury
Secondary antagonist threat seeded through exposition
core_engine.tension_building: Interweaving multiple unresolved plot threads creates sustained reader uncertainty

state_variables: {'protagonist_status': 'Under pursuit by supernatural creature after initial encounter', 'antagonist_threads': ['Primary: Active supernatural predator pursuit', 'Secondary: Technical destruction device threat introduced via exposition'], 'ally_status': "Wounded-pride character joins protagonist's cause after being humbled", 'narrative_position': 'Mid-action cliffhanger with creature approaching'}
reader_rewards: Revelation that energy manipulation may be species-wide ability rather than human-learned skill
Connection established between founding legend and supernatural creature encounter
New antagonist introduced as existential threat to entire population
Character arc development for pride-wounded ally whose assassination was manipulated
reusable_mechanisms: AI character delivers exposition through debate with protagonist
Mythological origin story recontextualized as literal historical event
Supernatural creature pursues protagonist after initial encounter
Wounded pride drives character to seek redemption through dangerous mission
Character with technical skills joins protagonist's cause after being humbled
non_reusable_specifics: Specific martial arts technique names and founding sect legends
Named immortal figures from founding mythology
Specific location names and geographical features
Named antagonist with specific device creation
risk_patterns: Too many plot threads introduced simultaneously without resolution
Excessive exposition delivered through AI dialogue dumps
Text contains garbled/missing characters affecting readability
Chapter ends mid-action without narrative resolution
